sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَرْحَمَ النَّاسِ بِالْأَطْفَالِ وَالصِّغَارِ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, bio je najmilosrdniji čovjek prema djeci i mlađima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) was the most merciful of people towards children and the young.

sentences.arabic: رَوَى الْبُخَارِيُّ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ قَبَّلَ حَفِيدَهُ الْحَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُمَا [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، رَقْمُ ٥٩٩٧].
sentences.translation: El-Buhari bilježi da je Poslanik poljubio svog unuka el-Hasana b.
sentences.translationEn: Al-Bukhari narrated that the Prophet kissed his grandson al-Hasan bin Ali, may Allah be pleased with them [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, No. 5997].

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الصَّحَابَةُ الْكِرَامُ مِنْ هَذَا الْمَوْقِفِ أَهَمِّيَّةَ الرَّحْمَةِ وَاللِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Alija, radijallahu anhuma [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o adabu, broj 5997].
sentences.translationEn: The noble Companions learned from this situation the importance of mercy and gentleness.

sentences.arabic: الدِّينُ الْإِسْلَامِيُّ يَدْعُو إِلَى التَّعَامُلِ بِرِفْقٍ مَعَ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Plemeniti ashabi su naučili iz ove situacije važnost milosti i blagosti.
sentences.translationEn: The Islamic religion calls for dealing kindly with all of Allah's creation.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَقْتَدِي بِأَخْلَاقِ الرَّسُولِ فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ مَعَ عَائِلَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Islamska vjera poziva na blago postupanje sa svim Allahovim stvorenjima. Mi se ugledamo na Poslanikov moral u našem svakodnevnom životu sa našim porodicama.
sentences.translationEn: We follow the Prophet's character in our daily lives with our families.
